title: codex 使用 5.4 以上版本模型压缩上下文总失败？
content: In long tasks, versions 5.4 and 5.5 consistently fail when automatic context compression occurs. The model disconnects via a stream error, causing the task to end and retries to fail. A reliable workaround is to temporarily switch the model to 5.3, let compression succeed, then switch back to 5.4. Although this patch helps, it is not a permanent solution; the issue persists despite attempts like adjusting TCP user timeout. The problem remains unresolved and seeks better fixes.

He targets the problems created by a planned‑economy mindset—price dualism, rigid guiding prices, and ineffective non‑standard supplies—which have disconnected the brand from consumers and distorted market demand. Chen’s measures include ending forced bundles, adopting代理 sales for non‑standard products, and better aligning price and supply with seasonal demand. The reports show upticks in core and series products, suggesting his approach is improving market alignment.

Both introduced similar innovations, such as DeepSeek’s MLA attention and Kimi’s Muon optimizer, and maintained complementary approaches to residual connections and long‑context reasoning. This partnership illustrates China’s collective progress in large‑model research, driven by shared vision rather than solo competition.

title: 市场为何对伊朗战争漠不关心
content: Markets overlook the Iran war because its economic impact is limited, with the conflict confined mainly to the Middle East and not directly affecting major global trade routes or key economic partners of most investors. The uncertainty it generates is already priced into commodity markets, and the potential disruptions are outweighed by stronger factors such as global growth prospects, monetary policy, and geopolitical events elsewhere that dominate investor focus.

title: Education must go beyond the mere production of words
content: Education should prioritize more than simply teaching students to write and speak. Rather than focusing only on word production, learning should cultivate critical thinking, problem‑solving, creativity, and practical skills relevant to modern society. Schools ought to develop cognitive abilities, emotional intelligence, and real‑world competencies that enable students to apply knowledge effectively and adapt to changing environments. This broader approach ensures education produces thoughtful, capable individuals rather than mere language users.

title: Humpback whales are forming super-groups
content: Humpback whales are increasingly gathering in large, mixed-species groups—so‑called "super‑groups." These aggregations occur during migration and feeding, allowing whales to share information, coordinate behaviors, and benefit from safety in numbers. Researchers observe that such collective movement offers insights into whale social dynamics and has implications for conservation strategies.

title: Replace IBM Quantum back end with /dev/urandom
content: A discussion on Hacker News explores replacing IBM’s quantum computing backend with the Unix random device, /dev/urandom, as a simpler alternative. The post examines the feasibility of redirecting quantum operations to this pseudo‑random source, debating its suitability for testing and development without real quantum hardware. It highlights potential benefits, such as reduced latency and easier debugging, while noting limitations like lack of true quantum behavior and the impact on algorithm validation.

title: AI打倒了英特尔，AI又救了英特尔
content: In August 2024 Intel’s share price plunged 26 %, and by November it was removed from the Dow as NVIDIA became a component, marking a symbolic shift from CPU to GPU dominance. A three‑CEO succession failed to reverse the decline; under CEO Pat Gelsinger the company invested heavily in fabs but lost $150 billion in market cap. In March 2025 C. L. Chen took over, cut costs, focused on Xeon data‑center CPUs and its foundry business, and welcomed partners—NVIDIA (investment & joint development), Google (large Xeon order) and Elon Musk’s Terafab. These alliances and a move toward AI inference, where CPUs orchestrate GPUs, drove a nearly 20 % post‑earnings rally, suggesting Intel’s resilience in the new AI‑inference era.

title: DeepSeek-V4 预览版本正式发布并开源
content: DeepSeek‑V4 preview is released and open‑sourced. It supports million‑token long context, leading in agent capabilities, world knowledge, and reasoning among Chinese and open‑source models. Its API updates align with model_name changes. In Agentic Coding benchmarks, V4‑Pro matches the best open‑source model, outperforming others in agent tests. Within the company, it’s the preferred Agentic Coding model, offering better user experience than Sonnet 4.5 and quality close to Opus 4.6 without thought mode, though still behind Opus 4.6 with thought mode.

title: OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.5
content: OpenAI released GPT‑5.5 on Thursday, claiming it is the most intelligent and user‑friendly model yet. The update adds significant improvements in intelligence, natural interaction, and computational speed, while reducing token usage. GPT‑5.5 performs well across multiple benchmarks, surpassing earlier versions and competitors. It enhances computer‑based work and research, including drug discovery, and is intended as a foundation for future integrated AI applications. The model is fully available after launch, with variants tailored to different user types.

title: 谷歌计划向人工智能初创公司Anthropic投资至多400亿美元
content: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in AI startup Anthropic, beginning with a $10 billion stake at a $350 billion valuation, with the possibility of adding another $30 billion later. Anthropic has recently raised $5 billion from Amazon at the same valuation and has a $2 billion option, following a $3 billion raise in February. Google cloud will provide computing resources for five years.

title: 华为昇腾超节点系列产品全面支持 DeepSeek V4
content: Huawei’s Ascend super‑node line now fully supports the released DeepSeek V4 models. The Ascend 950 chip reduces attention calculation and memory access costs, boosting inference speed. Combined with quantization, it delivers high throughput and low latency. All Ascend A3 super‑nodes are compatible, and Huawei supplies training reference implementations for these nodes.

title: 黄仁勋要求英伟达所有员工使用 OpenAI 的 Codex 编程工具
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang emailed all employees, ordering them to use OpenAI’s Codex programming tool based on GPT-5.5. OpenAI has made Codex available to NVIDIA staff, with 10,000 employees already testing it and producing results across departments. Jointly, OpenAI and NVIDIA have established a Codex lab and plan to hold online workshops in the coming weeks.

title: 马斯克传记作者艾萨克森：特斯拉与 SpaceX 终将合并
content: Biographer Walter Isaacson believes Tesla and SpaceX will ultimately merge, mirroring market analyses that highlight their close capital and technological ties. Tesla has already invested $2 billion in SpaceX shares and the firms plan joint chip‑fabrication work. Wedbush analyst Dan Avsans predicts the merger by 2027 to create a vertically integrated AI ecosystem. Challenges include valuation gaps, shareholder dilution, and antitrust scrutiny, but investors are betting on Musk’s combined vision.

title: 美团启动万亿级大模型测试，基于国产算力集群完成训练
content: Meituan has begun testing a new trillion‑parameter AI model that was trained entirely on domestic computing clusters. The model is currently only available to invited users, marking a potential breakthrough in using domestic infrastructure for large‑scale AI training.

title: 华谊兄弟正式破产
content: Huayi Brothers, once a leading Chinese film studio valued at 90 billion yuan, has been declared bankrupt. Unable to repay a 1.14 million‑yuan advertising debt, the court approved a pre‑restructuring proceeding, freezing all shares of the two founding brothers. The company’s assets and operations now face significant uncertainty.

title: Gartner：阿里云市场份额升至 32.8%，再度扩大中国第一优势

Its revenue grew 34.4%, far exceeding the industry average, driven by AI demand. Internationally, global share increased from 7.2% to 7.7% and revenue accelerated by about 35%, indicating faster international expansion.

title: 被中国新能源车吊打后，BBA坐不住了
content: BBA (Mercedes‑Benz, BMW, Audi) are pivoting their strategy in China at the 2026 Beijing auto show, unveiling 60+ new electric vehicles that focus on local development, pure‑electric platforms, advanced intelligent systems, and direct pricing models. After past failures rooted in “fossil‑to‑electric” conversion, limited localization, and lagging tech, the brands now emphasize Chinese‑specific design, high‑range batteries, and unified price points. However, they face stiff competition from domestic and new‑energy entrants that dominate the luxury EV segment, making it uncertain whether BBA can regain its former dominance.

title: “机器人制造”运动鞋是奥比里冲击伦敦马拉松个人最佳成绩的关键

This precise, custom production method contributed to faster strides and better overall performance, enabling Obiri to achieve his fastest time.

content: AI functions for many middle‑aged men like fishing: a respectable way to be alone. Their day is split among roles—manager, family member, social participant—leaving little personal time. title: 我忍不住了，要说说茅台
content: Earnings for Kweichow Moutai’s Q1 2026 show modest 7% revenue growth to ¥53.9 B and 4% gross‑margin decline, largely due to a massive jump in retail sales of its flagship “i‑Moutai” product and a shift from channel‑based selling to direct sales. Direct‑sale revenue surged 27%, with “i‑Moutai” accounting for 40% of total sales, increasing its share dramatically. Consumption‑tax costs rose 15% of revenue, reflecting higher volume at lower unit prices. Net profit barely moved, revealing that revenue gains didn’t translate into higher margins. The company is restructuring its product pyramid and pricing strategy, moving toward a more balanced mix of flagship, premium, and series offerings and tightening control over channel pricing. This shift aims to reduce channel lock‑ins, stabilize margins, and support sustainable growth amid high consumer demand.

title: 茅台生意
content: Since 2021, Maotai’s overall business has dropped 27% in revenue and profit (from ¥231.3 bn to ¥169 bn). However, the Maotai Co. has increased its share of the business, capturing an estimated 90% of income and profit after dealer reforms. Its reported profit rose despite the contraction because its profit‑share grew. If the market continues to shrink, Maotai Co.’s bottom line will likely decline, and the company’s resilience will be tested from 2026.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 浊静徐清

NVIDIA’s market cap reached a $5 trillion milestone, sparking a retail-registered rally across the semiconductor sector. Shares surged more than 27% since March, with strong gains in April and multiple tech stocks—TSMC, Intel, AMD, Micron, and Texas Instruments—rising as well. The surge reflects heightened demand for AI computing, positioning GPUs as indispensable infrastructure. The broader industry cycle has shifted toward growth, highlighting the risk of missing the AI wave rather than fearing bubbles. This commentary is not investment advice.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 但斌
